Chronology of every recorded fact about [[World Spirit]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 8''' — A World Spirit is required to sustain a livable atmosphere on a planet.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 45''' — Horizon identifies as a World Spirit.}}

== The Engineer ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 3''' — The Zenith Starship has a holographic World Spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 4''' — A person could be possessed by a World Spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|'''Ch 19''' — World Spirits can be called up and have personalities based on their reflections in the Aether.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 11''' — World Spirits are entities that can be bargained with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 18''' — The narrator has a World Spirit to help with casting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 20''' — The World Spirit resists Neth’terith with lightning blasts and green shields.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — Beshkin has a World Spirit known for its neutrality.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 38''' — The moon of Titan Force headquarters does not have its own World Spirit.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 7''' — The World Spirit was eager to change the development of Basyrryx.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 10''' — About a million planets have World Spirits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 26''' — The World Spirit is described as chaotic and unreliable.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 31''' — The World Spirit can manifest and provide information.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 48''' — The World Spirit clasped hands with the narrator to seal a deal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — The World Spirit was targeted with a sealing spell.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 49''' — The narrator has never cursed a World Spirit before.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
